queries.question: Show all the documentary films, in addition show just those short films which had a 500K budget.
queries.sql:
SELECT Films.Title 
FROM Films
WHERE Films.FilmType = "Documentary" OR Films.FilmType = "Short Film" AND Films.Budget = 500000.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?films a :Films .
  ?films p:Title ?title .
  ?films p:FilmType ?filmtype_w .
  ?films p:FilmType ?filmtype_w2 .
  ?films p:Budget ?budget_w .
  FILTER((STR(?filmtype_w) = "Documentary" || (STR(?filmtype_w2) = "Short Film" && (STR(?budget_w) = "500000" || STR(?budget_w) = "500000.0"))))
}

queries.question: Give me all documentaries and short films with a 500K budget.
queries.sql:
SELECT Films.Title 
FROM Films
WHERE (Films.FilmType = "Documentary" OR Films.FilmType = "Short Film") AND Films.Budget = 500000.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?films a :Films .
  ?films p:Title ?title .
  ?films p:FilmType ?filmtype_w .
  ?films p:FilmType ?filmtype_w2 .
  ?films p:Budget ?budget_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?filmtype_w) = "Documentary" || STR(?filmtype_w2) = "Short Film")) && (STR(?budget_w) = "500000" || STR(?budget_w) = "500000.0")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me all documentaries and short films with a 500K budget.
